query:
ALTER TABLE triage_objects 
  ADD COLUMN analystSeverityOverride ENUM('critical','high','medium','low','info') NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN analystRouteOverride ENUM('A_DUPLICATE_NOISY','B_LOW_CONFIDENCE','C_HIGH_CONFIDENCE','D_LIKELY_BENIGN') NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN analystNotes TEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN analystConfirmed TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN analystUserId INT NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN feedbackAt TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL;

ALTER TABLE alert_queue
  ADD COLUMN pipelineTriageId VARCHAR(64) NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN autoTriageStatus ENUM('pending','running','completed','failed','skipped') NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  ADD INDEX aq_pipelineTriageId_idx (pipelineTriageId);
